questions.question: Who was the first person to see the risen Jesus?
What did Thomas say he needed to see before he would believe Jesus had risen?
options: The nail marks in Jesus' hands
questions.answer: The nail marks in Jesus' hands

questions.question: When Thomas saw Jesus and touched his wounds, he said 'My Lord and my God!'
Jesus said to her, 'Don't hold me, for I haven't yet ascended to my _____.'
Blessed are those who have not _____, and have believed.
